project.title: Locations Master Data
project.description: Canonical master dataset of geographic locations: each location with its identifiers, hierarchy and associated images, exposed via a thin lookup API to the rest of the platform.

flow.title: Lookup & Enrichment Flow
flow.description: Other services call a lookup with a slug or coordinate. The service resolves the location, hydrates with its hierarchy and images, and returns a single canonical record.

domains.name: Data
domains.description: The canonical location records and their images.

steps.title: Lookup Request
steps.description: A consuming service asks for a location by slug, id or coordinate.

steps.title: Location Resolver
steps.description: Picks the right canonical location and walks its parent hierarchy (city → region → country).

steps.title: Location Store
steps.description: Master table of locations with their identifiers and hierarchy.

steps.title: Image Binder
steps.description: Attaches the location's images (banner, thumbnail) onto the response.

steps.title: Lookup Response
steps.description: Returns the canonical location to the caller.
